Headline: #84 Peterson Temporary Reroute near Bryn Mawr/Sheridan
ShortDescription: 84 Peterson buses temp. rerouted: due to, police activity near Bryn Mawr/Sheridan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#84 Peterson buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near due to police activity near Bryn Mawr/Sheridan.

Eastbound buses will operate via Ridge and Broadway  including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses will operate via Broadway, Hollywood and Ridge.

Allow extra travel time.
